Let me break it down for you:

Gmurphy really wants the enlighten that draw her 0 cost (i think ita e3?)

Doresain is fine at E1 (but his not a top tier dps)

Castor can operate at e0 as long as your not making him the carry

Tawil is like, an ok support i guess, but its an old arc 1 unit, perhaps dont heavy invest at this time

Daff: no

Mouchette: best dps in game atm, but need minimum e2 to feel smooth
